changes.value: Write comprehensive integration tests for sem-core semantic diff engine covering: modified function detection, added/deleted functions, reordered functions, renamed functions, struct modifications, multi-file diffs, direct parser registry usage, and real git repo integration."
Create git semantic diff integration test
